_comment: showcard LT-0 dataset crop boxes. Filenames + boxes only (NO image bytes). Boxes are [left, top, right, bottom] in EXIF-TRANSPOSED full-resolution pixel coords (all source frames are 7008x4672 after ImageOps.exif_transpose). dataset_prep.py applies exif_transpose FIRST, then this crop, then resizes longest side to 1024. Boxes authored after viewing every source photo; subject fills most of frame with generous headroom, face prominent.
